briefs.title: Port land property assessment values updated for the 2026 BC taxation year
briefs.summary: BC updated the Port Land Valuation Regulation to set new assessed values (the official dollar value used to calculate property tax) for port lands for the 2026 tax year, replacing the previous 2025 figures.
briefs.action_required: Check your 2026 property tax assessment if you own or lease port land in BC.

key_dates.label: BC Port Land Valuation Regulation 2026 taxation year values take effect

briefs.industries: Transportation & Logistics, Natural Resources, Landlord & Property Mgmt
